title: Anti Autototem
description: A Minecraft anti Auto-Totem AC plugin.
body:
## NROS AntiCheat

**NROS AntiCheat** is a lightweight and powerful AntiCheat solution for Minecraft 1.21, focused on accurate **AutoTotem detection**. It is performance-friendly, highly configurable, and built for modern server environments using PacketEvents.

---

### ✨ Features
- Advanced AutoTotem detection  
- Adjustable reaction time threshold (milliseconds)  
- Flag-based violation system  
- Multi-stage punishments (Kick, Command, or Velocity proxy action)  
- Discord webhook integration  
- Staff notification system  
- Bypass permission support  
- Easy reload & management commands  
- Optimized for Minecraft 1.21  

---

### 📌 Commands
`/nrosac reload` – Reload the configuration  
`/nrosac flags` – View a player's current flags  
`/nrosac reset` – Reset a player's flags  

**Permission:**  
`nros.anticheat.admin`

---

### 🔐 Permissions
- `nros.anticheat.admin` – Access to all admin commands  
- `nros.anticheat.notify` – Receive AutoTotem flag notifications  
- `nros.anticheat.bypass` – Bypass AutoTotem detection  

**Default Prefix:**  
`[NROS-AC]`

---

### ⚖ Punishment System
Automatic punishments based on configurable flag thresholds:

- Kick the player  
- Execute a server command (e.g. `ban %player% Cheating`)  
- Execute a command on a Velocity proxy  

Fully customizable in the configuration file.

---

### 🔗 Discord Integration
Send detection logs and flag alerts directly to your Discord server via webhook.

---

### 📦 Dependency
- PacketEvents  
- Velocity-Connecter

---

### 👨‍💻 Developer
Created by **MaxRoid**  
Website: https://www.nowaroid.me/maxroid/
